Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: top hats (hats) [300046113], hats [300046106], headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Collapsible top hats, often covered in black silk.
Sombrero de copa plegable, frecuentemente cubierto de seda negra.
Inklapbare hoge hoeden die vaak overtrokken zijn met zwarte zijde.
可折疊的高頂禮帽，通常覆以黑絲。
Klappbarer Zylinder, oft mit schwarzer Seide bezogen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
